[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000001111 4
1 111101001 6
2 101001000 3
3 111011000 5
4 011111000 5
5 101001111 6
6 000100100 2
7 011111111 8
